line: - Existing `watch` had already drifted from the plan: it was a one-shot snapshot command with a nested `snapshot` payload, so meeting the bead required promoting it into a real streaming robot loop.

items: Existing `watch` had already drifted from the plan: it was a one-shot snapshot command with a nested `snapshot` payload, so meeting the bead required promoting it into a real streaming robot loop.

line: - Compact summaries are available in session logs via `isCompactSummary`, so `summary_length` can be computed without inventing new state.

items: Compact summaries are available in session logs via `isCompactSummary`, so `summary_length` can be computed without inventing new state.

line: - Kept human `saw watch` behavior one-shot and only changed `--robot` into streaming mode to minimize blast radius.

items: Kept human `saw watch` behavior one-shot and only changed `--robot` into streaming mode to minimize blast radius.

line: - Emitted one flat JSON object per line with `#[serde(tag = "event")]` so `jq` can filter directly on `.event` and other top-level fields.
